checks.finding: design.md ## Architecture (lines 16-48) gives a file-tree with component boundaries (server/index, root, path-guard, parsers, tools/core, tools/evidence, resources, next-command), states integration context ('sdd-forge リポジトリ初の Node/TypeScript コンポーネント', path-guard as single choke-point for all reads, parser cannot-parse contract), and names technology per layer (Node>=20/TypeScript for backend, esbuild for build, no frontend layer per Feature Type: api-only). The ## Layer Specifications table records UX/Frontend as 'N/A recorded' with rationale. No issues found.

SKIP: no explicit component dependency list is present in ## Architecture or ## Components; checked architecture narrative for circular import patterns — flow is linear/one-directional (index -> server -> tools/resources -> parsers -> path-guard as single terminal choke point at line 45), no cycle indicated.

design.md ## Data Plan (lines 89-109) specifies Data Entities (8-row table, each with Source/Parser), Existing Data Affected ('なし（読み取りのみ）。'), and Migration Strategy ('不要（新規コンポーネント、既存データ形式の変更なし）。'). All three required sub-fields present and explicit. No issues found.

design.md ## API / Contract Plan (lines 111-147) defines the common response envelope, lists representative tool data shapes, references the canonical schema contracts/sdd-forge-mcp-tools.v1.schema.json for full coverage of all 13 tools + 5 resources (enumerated in requirements.md REQ-002/REQ-003/REQ-004), and states versioning policy (v1, breaking changes require v2 + ADR). No existing endpoints deprecated (net-new feature). No issues found.

design.md ## Security Boundaries (lines 166-173) names both trust boundaries (B1: client->server stdio, B2: server->filesystem), states auth/authz at each (B1: same-OS-user local stdio + JSON Schema input validation; B2: path-guard realpath->allowlist->denylist fail-closed), addresses data classification (internal / internal-restricted for denylist), and OWASP concerns (Injection at B1, Broken Access Control + Path Traversal at B2), with full STRIDE/OWASP detail present in security-spec.md. No PII handled (read-only SDD metadata). No issues found.
SKIP: Feature Type is api-only (design.md line 4), confirmed consistent with ux-spec.md and frontend-spec.md both stating 'N/A — no change: ... UI なし'.

design.md ## Test Strategy (lines 149-164) covers unit scope (parsers正常系/cannot-parse系, path-guard traversal/symlink/denylist, next-command fixture), integration scope (MCP SDK InMemory/stdio harness, installer *.tests.sh/*.tests.ps1), acceptance verification (golden test TEST-001 vs check-task-state.sh for AC-001), concrete tooling (node:test, tsc --noEmit, esbuild, grep-based static readonly check TEST-011), and named artifact paths. TEST-005 (MCP Inspector CLI smoke) serves as the named end-to-end verification path for this api-only feature. No issues found.

Every component referenced in ## Architecture and ## API / Contract Plan (server/index, root, path-guard, parsers, tools/core, tools/evidence, resources, next-command, installer 拡張, CI 拡張) is defined with a row in the ## Components table (design.md lines 51-62). No undefined component references found.

design.md ## ADR Change Log (lines 82-87) references ADR-0002 and ADR-0003. Verified both exist as files: docs/adr/0002-sdd-forge-mcp-readonly-server.md and docs/adr/0003-mcp-dist-bundle-distribution.md. Both cover the feature's architectural departures. No undocumented architectural decision found.
